subcodes.first_line: O Afnán! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness. The letter of the honoured Afnán—upon him be My glory and My loving-kindness—that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی علیک بهائی و عنایتی نامه جناب افنان ت ق علیه بهائی و عنایتی که
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power of prayer, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @wisdom [hikmat]
